metadata.title: Text Extractor
metadata.description: A (companion) plugin to facilitate the extraction of text from images (OCR) and PDFs.

regex.source: Notice("Text Extract - Could not create note: " + e2.message)
regex.target: Notice("文本提取-无法创建注释：" + e2.message)

regex.source: Notice("Text Extractor - Text copied to clipboard")
regex.target: Notice("文本提取器-将文本复制到剪贴板")

regex.source: name: "Extract text into a new note"
regex.target: name: "将文本提取到新注释中"

regex.source:
text: `A list of languages to use for OCR. e.g. if your vault contains documents in English and French, you'd want to add 'eng' and 'fra' here.
        This setting only applies to images, not PDFs. You may have to clear the cache after changing this setting.`
regex.target: text: `用于光学字符识别的语言列表。例如，如果你的保险库中包含英语和法语的文档，你需要在这里添加‘eng’和‘fra’。此设置仅适用于图像，不适用于 PDF。更改此设置后，你可能需要清除缓存。`

regex.source: .setDesc('Add "Text Extractor" actions to the right click menu in the file explorer.')
regex.target: .setDesc('在文件资源管理器的右键菜单中添加“文本提取器”操作。')

regex.source: .innerHTML = `Erase all Text Extractor cache data. Use this if you want to re-extract all your files, e.g after a change in language settings.
regex.target: .innerHTML = `擦除所有文本提取器缓存数据。如果您想重新提取所有文件，例如在更改语言设置后，请使用此选项。

regex.source: Be careful that re-extracting all your files can take a long time.`;
regex.target: 请注意，重新提取所有文件可能需要很长时间。`;
Notice(`文本提取器 - 从缓存中移除 ${file.path} from cache`)

regex.source: Notice(`Text Extractor - Extracting text from file ${file.path}, please wait...`)
regex.target: Notice(`文本提取器 - 从文件中提取文本 ${file.path}, please wait...`)

regex.source: Notice(`Text Extractor - Error extracting text from file ${file.path}`)
regex.target: Notice(`文本提取器 - 从文件提取文本时出错 ${file.path}`)

regex.source: .error(`MultiSelect's maxSelect must be null or positive integer, got ${maxSelect}`)
regex.target: .error(`多选框的 maxSelect 属性必须为 null 或正整数，当前值为 ${maxSelect}`)

regex.source: .error(`MultiSelect's selected prop should always be an array, got ${selected}`)
regex.target: .error(`多选框的 selected 属性必须始终是一个数组，当前值为 ${selected}`)

regex.source: .error(`MultiSelect maxSelect=${maxSelect} < required=${required}, makes it impossible for users to submit a valid form`)
regex.target: .error(`多选最大选择数=${maxSelect} < required=${required}, 使用户无法提交有效的表单`)

regex.source: .error(`MultiSelect has allowUserOptions=${allowUserOptions} but createOptionMsg=${createOptionMsg} is falsy. This prevents the "Add option" <span> from showing up, resulting in a confusing user experience.`)
regex.target: .error(`多选框具有允许用户自定义选项的功能=${allowUserOptions} 但创建选项消息=${createOptionMsg} 为假值。这会阻止 “添加选项”（按钮 / 功能）显示出来，从而导致混乱的用户体验。`)

regex.source: .error("Text Extractor - OCR Worker exception for " + U2.name)
regex.target: .error("文本提取器 -  OCR 工作器异常 " + U2.name)
